items.h: WWE's Rhea Ripley Offers Injury Update On Husband & AEW Star Buddy Matthews
items.p: While on Stephanie McMahon's podcast, WWE's Rhea Ripley gave an update on Buddy Matthews following an injury he suffered in an AEW match last year.
